# Viso

> Viso is a web design agency helping small and medium-sized businesses improve their online presence with professional, affordable websites.

## About
Viso was founded by Jesse to help small and medium-sized businesses build a stronger online presence — without the burden of figuring it out on their own. Website builders can be a headache and never quite deliver professional results. And most design agencies aren't reasonably priced for smaller businesses — that's where Viso comes in, delivering a professional service that fits your budget.

## Services

### Web & Brand Design
Your website is often the first impression you make, and a good design instantly builds trust. Modern, responsive designs that reflect your brand and drive results.

### SEO & Visibility
Strategic search optimization so your customers can discover you online.

### Custom IT Solutions
Tailored software and automation that streamline your business operations — from custom domains and integrations to AI-powered automations.

### Web Support
Spend less time problem-solving and more time running your business. Expert website support available for any changes post-launch — like having a dedicated web administrator on your team.

## Process
1. Discover — We take the time to understand your business, your goals, and your customers.
2. Design — A visual identity and layout built around your brand and your users.
3. Build — Clean, high-performance development that brings the design to life.
4. Launch — Sit back and enjoy your new website, ready to make an impression from day one.

## Pricing
Viso offers affordable web design packages starting as low as $39/month, with no hidden fees. Every plan includes design, hosting, and ongoing maintenance — everything a small business needs to get online and stay there.

## Target Audience
Small and medium-sized businesses looking for an affordable, professional web presence without the complexity of managing it themselves.

## Key Values
- Small business focused
- Transparent and reasonable pricing
- Professional results
- Ongoing support post-launch
